title: LDAP Injection
description: Constructing LDAP queries with unescaped user input allows attackers to alter query logic, bypass authentication, or enumerate directory entries (OWASP A03:2021 / CWE-90).

finding.message: Potential LDAP injection via '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Escape all special LDAP characters: ( ) * \ NUL / in search filters before use.
Use LDAP libraries that support parameterized filter construction.
Validate usernames against a strict allowlist of permitted characters (alphanumeric + limited symbols).
OWASP LDAP Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet.
